---
title: "Quarto 1"
author: "Hyder Ali"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| message: false 
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

```{r}
penguins
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

penguins %>%
  drop_na(bill_length_mm, bill_depth_mm, species) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = bill_length_mm,
    y = bill_depth_mm,
    color = species
  )) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    title = "Penguin Bill Dimensions by Species",
    x = "Bill Length (mm)",
    y = "Bill Depth (mm)",
    color = "Species"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
